# Shadowscale's Horn
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Shadowscale%27s%20Horn&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Shadowscale's Horn
| desc = A sharp bone, cut from the head of the fallen Shadowscale.
| tier = ST
| slot = dagger

| minDmg = 95
| maxDmg = 165
| shots = 1
| rof = 125
| range = 
| amplitude = 1
| frequency = 0.2
| projSpeed = 14
| lifetime = 400
| fameb = 5
| feedp = 500

| effects = yes
| pierce = yes
| multihit = yes
| passthrough = yes

| bonuses = {{stat|att|4}} {{stat|spd|2}}

| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped by: [[Shadowscale]].
|range2 = 5.19}}

<noinclude>
{{NavDaggers}}
</noinclude><noinclude>
[[Category: Daggers]]</noinclude><noinclude>
[[Category:Tiered weapons]]</noinclude>
